title: MC-TIER
description: Shows MC-TIER ranks in player nametags, tab list, and in-game profile search.
body:
# MC-TIER Tier Tagger

**The official MC-TIER player tag mod!**

This mod displays players' MC-TIER rankings in nametags, the tab list, and the in-game profile search system.

---

## ⚠️ IMPORTANT

This mod requires **[uku-lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/ukulib)** and **[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)** to work properly.

## 🔍 Overview

**MC-TIER Tier Tagger** is a custom fork of the popular TierTagger mod, fully integrated with the **MC-TIER (Nethpot)** ranking system while preserving all original functionality.

It allows you to instantly view your opponents’ skill levels and global rankings directly in-game without needing to open a browser.

> **Core Features:**
>
> * **Nametags:** View Tier icons above players' heads.
> * **Tab List:** Track all players' current ranks directly in the TAB menu.
> * **Profile Search:** Access detailed statistics through the built-in in-game profile system.

---

## 🎮 Features & Visuals

The mod provides player profiles and rankings with up-to-date data:

* **Global Ranking:** Your worldwide position on MC-TIER.
* **Mode-Based Tiers:** Rankings for Vanilla, Sword, Pot, and other game modes.
* **Lightweight & Fast:** Fully client-side and optimized for performance with no FPS impact.

---

## 📦 Version Support

* **Minecraft:** 1.21.x
* **Loader:** Fabric
* **Requirement:** Only needs to be installed on your client; works on all supported servers.

---

## 📜 License & Fork Information

This mod is a fork of the original TierTagger project with additional custom features.

* Licensed under **MPL-2.0**
* Icons and ranking data are provided by **MC-TIER**
* Special thanks to the original developers
